response.overview: When Patrik disappeared, that's when it all began. Something was out there, something was waiting for us.  We could never have imagined that something like this could happen!"  Freakdemon is a horror film shot in 2000 at Klutmarksheden outside Skellefteå. The creators of Freakdemon were the brothers André and Joakim Lundgren and their production company "GM Produktion" (Greymountain Produktion). Joakim Lundgren tragically passed away in 2016
response.title: Freak Demon
